message:
docs(ft-xbnl0.5.2): capture first finish-line guard composite validation snapshot

Records the first composite snapshot produced by
`scripts/check_finish_line_guards.sh` (landed in 8e6d2df2), and the
matching timestamp refreshes on the two sub-guard validation JSONs
that the composer re-runs as part of its sweep.

Scope:

1. docs/ft-xbnl0-5-2-finish-line-guards-validation.json (new, +~95 lines)

   First committed composite validation artifact. The header records
   `contract_id: ft.xbnl0.5.2.finish_line_guards.v1`, `bead_id:
   ft-xbnl0.5.2`, `checked_at: 2026-04-16T05:03:16Z`, and per-guard
   results:

     • `no_runtime_regression`              — passed
     • `asupersync_cutover_runtime_guards`  — passed
     • `fake_sdk_capability_contract`       — skipped
         (reason: `skip_via_FT_XBNL0_5_2_SKIP_CARGO_TEST`; the cargo
         test gate was intentionally skipped in this composer run to
         land the snapshot without blocking on slow
         `cargo test --features asupersync-runtime`)
     • `finish_line_verification_contract_shape` — failed
         (reason: `e2e_missing_summary_json_or_structured_log`; the
         downstream e2e fixture has not emitted the expected
         summary.json + structured log yet)

   Top-level `status: failed` reflects the last guard's outcome.
   Committing the failing snapshot deliberately: the composer's value
   is in making the CURRENT state of the invariants legible, and
   freezing a failing state is the right signal to future contributors
   that ft-xbnl0.5.2 still has open follow-on work (the e2e contract
   shape). Subsequent fixes will overwrite this file with a passing
   snapshot.

2. docs/asupersync-cutover-runtime-guard-validation.json (+1/-1)

   `checked_at` bump to 2026-04-16T05:03:17Z from 2026-04-16T04:53:14Z.
   The composer re-ran this sub-guard and the rest of the body is
   byte-identical — strict proof-of-freshness, no count or file-list
   changes.

3. docs/ft-xbnl0-2-6-no-runtime-regression-validation.json (+1/-1)

   Same — `checked_at` bump to 2026-04-16T05:03:17Z. Body unchanged.

No source, script, or manifest changes in this commit — it is
exclusively the validation-artifact side of running the composer for
the first time against main.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,56 @@
+{

+  "guards": [

+      }

+            "missing": "summary.json",

+          }
+        ]

+}
